text:
$ weatherspect -c
Creating config file in /home/vadim/.weatherspect...
$ weatherspect
Exiting with SIGUse of uninitialized value in sprintf at /usr/local/bin/weatherspect line 693.

How-To-Repeat: $ weatherspect -c
Creating config file in /home/vadim/.weatherspect...
$ weatherspect
Exiting with SIGUse of uninitialized value in sprintf at /usr/local/bin/weatherspect line 693.
